title: Theo's Sleepy Hide and Seek
synopsis: Little Theo plays peek-a-boo with his favorite bedtime toys as he gets ready for sleep, finding them hiding in cozy places around his bedroom.

pages.text: It's bedtime for Theo! But where are his favorite toys? Let's help him find them. Peek-a-boo, teddy bear! Where are you hiding?

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes stands in his cozy bedroom looking around curiously. A teddy bear's ear peeks out from behind a pillow on his bed, creating a playful hide-and-seek scene.
illustration.alt: Theo searching for his teddy bear in his bedroom

pages.text: There you are, teddy! You were hiding behind my pillow. Now, where is my soft blankie? Peek-a-boo, blankie!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes hugs his teddy bear while looking toward his dresser. A corner of a blue blankie peeks out from an open dresser drawer, partially hidden but ready to be discovered.
illustration.alt: Theo holding teddy bear while his blankie hides in the dresser

pages.text: Found you, blankie! You were in my dresser. Now let's find my sleepy lamb. Where could lamb be? Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes holds his blankie and teddy bear. A white stuffed lamb's fluffy tail peeks out from under the bed, creating a sweet hiding spot beneath the bed frame.
illustration.alt: Theo with his toys while lamb hides under the bed

pages.text: There's my lamb under the bed! Now Theo has all his friends. Teddy, blankie, and lamb are ready for sleepy time. Peek-a-boo, sleepy Theo! Time for dreams.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes snuggled in bed with his teddy bear, soft blankie, and white lamb. His eyes are peacefully closed, with a gentle nightlight glowing softly, creating a serene bedtime scene.
illustration.alt: Theo sleeping peacefully with all his bedtime toys

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where was Theo's teddy bear hiding?
questions.explanation: The teddy bear was hiding behind Theo's pillow on his bed!

questions.question: What color was Theo's blankie?
questions.explanation: Theo's soft blankie was blue and hiding in the dresser drawer.

questions.question: Where did the lamb hide?
questions.explanation: The fluffy white lamb was hiding under Theo's bed!
